name: Security vulnerability
about: Report a security vulnerability in the standards or implementation guides
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security, needs-review
assignees: ''

---

**Important:** For security-sensitive information, DO NOT open a public issue. Email [INSERT SECURITY EMAIL] instead.

If you are reporting a potential security vulnerability in how these standards are implemented or a theoretical attack vector, you may use this form. We will triage and determine if private disclosure is needed.

**Vulnerability Type:**
- [ ] Implementation bypass (way to circumvent standards)
- [ ] Child safety risk
- [ ] Data privacy exposure
- [ ] Social engineering via anthropomorphism
- [ ] Authority displacement mechanism
- [ ] Other (describe below)

**Affected Document(s):**
[List which documents contain the issue]

**Description:**
[Clear description of the vulnerability]

**Potential Impact:**
[Who could be harmed and how]

**Suggested Fix (optional):**
[If you have a proposed correction]

**References (if applicable):**
[Links to related research, CVE, etc.]

---

*For actual security incidents involving deployed systems, report to appropriate authorities immediately (FTC, ICO, law enforcement as applicable).*
